personas.name: Self-Discovering User
personas.description: A user seeking to understand themselves better and improve their mental wellbeing through self-awareness and emotional understanding.
goals: Gain a better understanding of themselves
pain_points: Difficulty explaining their emotions or feelings
Seeking solutions for negative emotions or thoughts
context: Using the app to complement or prepare for professional help (therapy)
constraints: May not be ready or able to pay for premium content
Looking for tools to help manage mental health struggles

personas.name: Satisfied User
personas.description: A highly satisfied user who appreciates the app's comprehensive insights and helpful features.
goals: To gain a deeper understanding of their emotions and thoughts
To track their emotional state over time
To receive helpful insights and guidance
pain_points: Occasional technical issues with daily questions (e.g., only showing pictures)
context: Recommended by a doctor or healthcare professional
Using the app for regular check-ins with themselves
Valuing the app's professional and comprehensive approach
constraints: May have limited technical expertise or patience for troubleshooting
Relies on the app's guidance and support for emotional well-being

personas.name: Mindful Tracker
personas.description: A user seeking to monitor and understand their mental health and mood fluctuations.
goals: Track and understand my mood changes
pain_points: Limited question options for tracking emotions
constraints: Needs to be easy to use and not overbearing

personas.name: Frugal Mental Health Enthusiast
personas.description: A budget-conscious individual seeking effective mental health support through a mobile app, valuing helpful features while being hesitant to pay for premium content.
goals: Find a helpful mental health app that provides valuable insights and support
Utilize app features to track and improve mental well-being
Access useful content without incurring significant costs
pain_points: Limited features in the free version hinder progress
Wishing for more free content, such as exercises and reading materials
Uncertain about the value of premium features to justify the cost
context: Currently using or considering a mental health mobile app
Seeking to manage mental health without financial strain
Values the app's helpful questions and insights
constraints: Financial limitations prevent investing in premium app features
Seeking to maximize free version benefits before considering a paid upgrade

personas.name: Frustrated Mental Health Tracker
personas.description: A user seeking to understand and manage their mental health, frustrated by limitations in free app features.
goals: effectively track and manage mental health
pain_points: limited access to features without paying
difficulty navigating mental health without comprehensive support
context: seeking a reliable and informative mental health tracking tool
constraints: financial constraints limiting access to premium features
